overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a survival horror game depicting a character in a green jacket walking through a densely fogged urban street toward Brookhaven Hospital. The atmosphere is ominous and tense with extremely limited visibility, culminating in the character ascending the stairs and entering the hospital building.

scene_state.functional_zone: fog-shrouded residential street with parked cars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the foggy street toward the hospital building visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: woman in purple coat standing on the sidewalk at the start of the clip

entered.detail: tree with sparse autumn foliage on the left side of the street
dark colored sedan parked on the right side of the street
multi-story residential building partially obscured by fog
large stone building with arched windows visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a fog-shrouded residential street with sparse trees and parked cars. A woman in a purple coat stands on the sidewalk as the character passes by. Through the heavy fog, the Brookhaven Hospital building is barely visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to hospital entrance with stone staircase

events.description: hospital building becomes clearly visible as the character approaches the entrance area

agents.ego_description: approaching the hospital entrance while walking along the foggy sidewalk

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the hospital entrance
hedge row along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character continues toward the hospital as the building facade becomes more prominent through the fog. The stone staircase leading to the entrance comes into view, while the residential buildings and parked cars fade into the fog behind. Street lamps line the approach path.

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs toward the entrance doors

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the weathered wooden entrance doors of Brookhaven Hospital

entered.detail: stone carved sign reading BROOKHAVEN HOSPITAL above the entrance
large double doors with peeling paint and burlap coverings
metal door handles on the wooden doors

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone staircase leading to the hospital entrance. The carved stone sign reading 'Brookhaven Hospital' becomes clearly visible above the weathered wooden doors. The surrounding trees and street furniture fall away as the character reaches the top of the stairs.

events.description: character opens the wooden doors and enters the hospital interior
lighting shifts from natural foggy exterior to warm yellow artificial interior lighting

agents.ego_description: pushing open the heavy wooden doors and stepping into the dimly lit hospital lobby

entered.detail: dimly lit interior lobby with yellow lighting and tiled floors
second set of doors visible at the far end of the lobby
wall-mounted light fixture emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character pushes open the weathered wooden doors and enters the hospital lobby. The environment transitions from the foggy exterior to a dimly lit interior illuminated by warm yellow wall sconces. The lobby features tiled floors and a second set of doors visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, fog-shrouded residential street into the dimly lit interior of a hospital. It begins with the character walking past parked cars and a woman in a purple coat, while the distant silhouette of Brookhaven Hospital is barely visible through the heavy mist. As the character advances, the residential surroundings fade into the fog and the building's facade becomes more prominent, guided by a line of street lamps toward a stone staircase. The scene then shifts focus to the ascent of these stairs, where the carved hospital sign becomes clearly visible above weathered wooden doors as the outdoor environment falls away. Finally, the camera follows the character as they push open the doors, transitioning from the oppressive gray exterior into a lobby featuring tiled floors and warm yellow wall sconces.
